response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) work, aligning well with cloud and GenAI requirements. However, his experience in production-grade AI solutions and RAG architectures is less explicit, and his leadership in AI-specific contexts is not fully evidenced.
strengths: Extensive experience (10+ years) in full-stack development with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud technologies (AWS), relevant to enterprise AI deployments.
Direct contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, showing familiarity with cutting-edge GenAI tooling.
Proven ability to lead technical projects, mentor teams, and drive engineering excellence across domains.
concerns: Lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building *production-grade AI solutions* (focus is more on full-stack and infrastructure).
Experience with vector databases and RAG architectures is not clearly detailed in the resume.
Customer-facing technical leadership in AI/GenAI contexts is not demonstrated (e.g., stakeholder discovery sessions).
